response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_id
ATTR client_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar

ENTITY Order
PK n_order
ATTR n_order : integer : PK
ATTR date : date : FK
ATTR client_id : integer : FK

ENTITY ProductionOperation
PK n_operation
ATTR n_operation : integer : PK
ATTR description_operation : varchar

ENTITY Workcenter
PK workcenter_id
ATTR workcenter_id : integer : PK

ENTITY Material
PK n_material
ATTR n_material : integer : PK
ATTR description_material : varchar

ENTITY OperationExecution
PK order_operation_id
ATTR order_operation_id : integer : PK
ATTR n_order : integer : FK
ATTR n_material : integer : FK
ATTR n_operation : integer : FK
ATTR workcenter_id : integer : FK
ATTR timestamp : datetime
ATTR quantity : decimal

REL Order -> Client : 1..N -> 1 : FK=client_id
REL OperationExecution -> Order : 1..N -> 1 : FK=n_order
REL OperationExecution -> Material : 1..N -> 1 : FK=n_material
REL OperationExecution -> ProductionOperation : 1..N -> 1 : FK=n_operation
REL OperationExecution -> Workcenter : 1..N -> 1 : FK=workcenter_id
